examples.student_message: Detect likely spelling error using resource-valid word and edit-distance candidate; resource absence is never an error.

bundles.next_step: Repair unclear or imprecise word choices before upgrading style.

examples.student_message: Finite clause with 'it + adjective' requires copula 'is/was' unless valid ellipsis.

bundles.next_step: Practise accurate clauses before writing longer paragraphs.
